overview: Integrative medical center combining traditional and holistic medicine, specializing in functional medicine and bioidentical hormone replacement therapy for menopause and andropause, as well as treatments for sleep disorders, fatigue, and digestive issues.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy for women and men
Medical acupuncture, herbal medicine, and health coaching
targetAudience: Women and men seeking hormone therapy for menopause/andropause and integrative treatment for sleep, fatigue, and digestive problems.
